source_details.label: Lenovo Product Engineering Notes SR670V...
source_details.preview: # SR670 V2 Engineering Notes  - Thermal design validated for sustained high-density GPU workloads. - BIOS tuning profile optimized for mixed training and inferencing jobs. - Supports enterprise observability integrations for GPU fleet health.  ## Validation Checklist - Power capping scenarios - PCIe throughput saturation tests - Failover and restart consistency
